# === canonical (hand-written; preserved by generator) ===
#
# Rule: url
# Category: technology
# Jurisdiction: global
#
# Preserves scheme, host, and port; same-length-masks path segments;
# masks query values and fragment with fixed 4-rune blocks; redacts
# userinfo defensively. Example: https://example.com/users/42?token=abc
# → https://example.com/*****/**?token=****.

https://example.com/users/42?token=abc	https://example.com/*****/**?token=****

# outputs are mask.Apply at generation time.
